title: RasPatient Pi: A Low-Cost Customizable LLM-Based Virtual Standardized Patient Simulator
citation: Grevisse C. RasPatient Pi: A Low-Cost Customizable LLM-Based Virtual Standardized Patient Simulator. Communications in Computer and Information Science. 2024. doi:10.1007/978-3-031-75147-9_9. Accessed 2026-05-03.
permitted_uses: Architecture context for customizable LLM-based virtual standardized patient simulators using ASR, LLMs, TTS, browser deployment, and teacher-authored scenario descriptions.
claims_supported: RasPatient Pi is described as a low-cost customizable LLM-based virtual standardized patient simulator.
The simulator leverages automatic speech recognition, LLMs, and text-to-speech.
Teachers can specify scenarios with short descriptions and the simulator can run alongside a manikin or in a browser with a 3D avatar.
claims_not_supported: That OpenClinXR can rely on unconstrained LLM dialogue for assessment.
That RasPatient Pi's design is sufficient for high-stakes exam-grade psychometrics.
